scope: PET microplastic particles in water; certified reference material
key_metrics_output: Certified count-based reference material for extraction and spectroscopy method validation
abstract: EURM®-060 is a reference material (RM) that, upon reconstitution, provides polyethylene terephthalate (PET) microplastic particles in a water matrix. It was produced in accordance with ISO 17034:2016 [1] and ISO 33405:2024 [2].

particle_size_range: ~10 µm PET particles in water matrix (certified reference material EURM-060)
key_metrics_output: Certified count-based reference material for extraction/spectroscopy method validation
